response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, closely aligning with the role's stack. His background includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling, along with a proven track record of ownership, problem-solving, and collaboration in enterprise environments.
strengths: Directly relevant full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record of building scalable systems and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong problem-solving, ownership, and collaboration skills in enterprise settings
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (though Node.js experience is strong)
Some roles involve niche languages (e.g., DLang) not directly relevant to the stack
German language skills are basic (though English is fluent)
